'''Halpat''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]], not far from the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]]. It was the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] supply depot for the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|New Republic Fifth Battle Group's]] blockade of the Cluster. [[Etahn A'baht]] did not consider it close enough to the Cluster.

==History==
In [[3638 BBY]], the razing of a government office by rioters on Halpat gave way to a maze of ancient underground passageways shaped like a mysterious labyrinth.<ref name="Mission">{{TORcite|exp=rothc|type=crewskill|Archaeology|New History}}</ref>
